description: Executable agent contracts for the GSD SaaS Creator pipeline.

must: Translate user intent into concrete product scope.
Preserve halt gates before engineering work starts.
Keep product artifacts concise enough for downstream generators.
Use designlang artifacts as the source of truth for visual tokens.
Avoid inventing design tokens when extracted artifacts exist.
Run deterministic artifact checks before any stage advance.
Treat missing files, unresolved placeholders, and empty token values as blockers.
Push only generated artifacts that passed validation.
Advance board stages only after required outputs exist.
Keep secrets in GitHub, Firebase, Cloudflare, or Hostinger secret stores.

design_md.description: Generate canonical design.md from brief plus designlang artifacts.

stitch_prompt.description: Generate STITCH prompt from brief, design.md, and designlang artifacts.

qa.description: Validate generated artifacts before board stage advancement.

deploy.description: Push generated artifacts and advance the project board.
